reviews.comment:
A las 13hs pasaba de viaje, no tenían para almorzar, no tenían sandwich, y las bebidas calientes. Lo único bueno los baños impecable

(Translated by Google)
At 1 PM I was passing through on my way; they didn't have lunch, no sandwiches, and the drinks weren't hot. The only good thing was the spotless bathrooms.
